text: وَ بِالْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ عَاصِمِ بْنِ حُمَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فِي مُكَاتَبٍ تُوُفِّيَ وَ لَهُ مَالٌ قَالَ يُحْسَبُ مِيرَاثُهُ عَلَى قَدْرِ مَا أُعْتِقَ مِنْهُ لِوَرَثَتِهِ وَ مَا لَمْ يُعْتَقْ مِنْهُ لِأَرْبَابِهِ الَّذِينَ كَاتَبُوهُ مِنْ مَالِهِ .

en.hubeali: And by the chain, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> regarding a contracted slave who died and for him was wealth. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘His inheritance would be calculated in accordance of what he had been emancipated (liberated) from it, to be for his inheritors, and whatever he had not been emancipated from it, is for his master who had contracted him, from his wealth’.
